rows.key_dev: AT&T Q1 2026 beat estimates (EPS $0.57, rev $31.5B +2.9% YoY); joined Verizon and T-Mobile in a JV to eliminate cellular dead zones on May 14, 2026.

Verizon Q1 2026 beat estimates (EPS $1.28 vs $1.21 expected), first positive Q1 postpaid phone net adds since 2013; raised Adjusted EPS guidance to top half of range. Issued $4B in junior subordinated notes in May 2026.

Comcast Q1 2026: Adjusted EBITDA -16.8% YoY (pro forma -8.8% post-Versant separation Jan 2026); Peacock subscribers +12% YoY to 46M and revenue surpassed $2B for first time, offsetting broadband subscriber pressure.
Disney Q2 FY2026 (May 6): raised FY2026 share repurchase target to $8B+ and guided Q3 total segment income ~$5.3B; Disney+/Hulu streaming profit +88% to $582M; full-year adjusted EPS growth ~12%.

WBD shareholders approved sale to Paramount Skydance (Apr 2026); Moody's has rating on review for further downgrade from Ba1; combined entity will carry ~$80B in long-term debt. All three agencies have junk or near-junk ratings.

Netflix abandoned WBD acquisition after Paramount Skydance outbid it (Feb 26, 2026); Moody's outlook revised to Positive and A3 affirmed. Netflix Q1 2026 revenue climbed 16% to $12.3B; 325M subscribers.
Amazon Q1 2026 strong; AWS revenue +24% YoY; advertising +23%; capex guidance raised to $200B for 2026 driven by AI infrastructure demand. AWS signed $38B deal with OpenAI in Nov 2025.

Alphabet (Google) issued multiple bond tranches in 2026 at Aa2/AA+ ratings; capex forecast to exceed $110B in 2026 driven by AI and data center buildout. Antitrust remedies remain an ongoing regulatory watchpoint.
Microsoft Azure AI demand driving capex growth in 2026; stock YTD reflects some pressure but AI monetization accelerating. No material negative credit events in last 60 days.

Oracle Q3 FY2026: first quarter in 15+ years with both organic revenue and EPS growing 20%+ in USD; AI infrastructure revenue +243% YoY; RPO at $553B. Moody's maintains Negative outlook citing high capex and elevated leverage expectations through FY2027-28.
Salesforce Agentforce AI platform gaining enterprise traction; no material negative credit events in the last 60 days. Next earnings Q2 FY2027 expected late August 2026.
IBM HashiCorp integration progressing; AI consulting and hybrid cloud remain core growth drivers. No material negative credit events in the last 60 days.
Moody's upgraded Apple to Aaa (highest corporate rating). Apple signed major deal with Google to use Gemini for Siri overhaul; iPhone 17 Pro launched Sept 2025. No material negative credit events.
Nutanix continues to grow cloud platform subscription ARR; Cisco partnership driving enterprise hybrid cloud adoption. No material negative credit events in the last 60 days.
Broadcom Q1 FY2026: record revenue $19.3B (+29% YoY), AI semiconductor revenue $8.4B (+106% YoY); Q2 guidance $22.0B (+47% YoY). New $10B share repurchase program authorized. Earnings Jun 3.
HP Inc AI PC refresh cycle supports near-term revenue; print segment faces secular headwinds. No material negative credit events in the last 60 days.
HPE named Ingram Micro and TD SYNNEX as its two global distribution partners (May 14, 2026), unifying its route-to-market post-Juniper Networks integration. Q2 FY2026 earnings call Jun 1, 2026.

Dell AI server demand driving Infrastructure Solutions Group revenue growth; PowerEdge AI server backlog remains strong amid hyperscaler capex expansion. No material negative credit events in the last 60 days.

Nextracker Q2 FY2026: revenue +42% YoY to $905M; raised FY2026 guidance to $3.275-$3.475B revenue; record backlog >$5B; formed Nextracker Arabia JV in Middle East. Strong solar demand despite tariff headwinds.

Sanmina Q2 FY2026 earnings beat (Apr 27); revenue tracking toward $16B+ in FY2027 with ZT Systems AI server ramp; book-to-bill >1.1; communication networks revenue +22% YoY. Q3 FY2026 call expected late July.
Announced spin-off of data center EMS business (~$6.6Bn revenue) and acquisition of Electrical Power Products. S&P affirmed BBB-/Stable May 6 2026; pro forma leverage expected to remain below 3x.
Jabil expanding through M&A and diversified portfolio with strength in AI data center infrastructure manufacturing. No material negative credit events in the last 60 days.
Arrow Electronics faces ongoing cycle pressure in component distribution; demand normalization post-2024 correction continues. No material negative credit events in the last 60 days.

Avnet navigating electronic component distribution cycle recovery; demand from AI infrastructure buildout expected to support volume growth in H2 2026. No material negative credit events in the last 60 days.

HPE named TD SYNNEX as one of two global distribution partners (May 14, 2026); completed acquisition of Exclusive Networks' AV/UC/gaming divisions in Jan 2026, expanding Maverick and Peripherals units.

HPE named Ingram Micro as a global distribution partner (May 14, 2026). Ingram Micro went public in Oct 2024; private equity ownership post-IPO reduces rating headroom. No material negative credit events.
CDW benefiting from enterprise AI-driven hardware refresh cycle; government and healthcare verticals remain steady contributors. No material negative credit events in the last 60 days.
Kyndryl FY2026 results (May 6): revenue $15.1B flat YoY, Adjusted EBITDA $2.7B (+6% YoY); company provided FY2027 outlook; agentic AI services launched. Positive profitability trajectory continues.

Cognizant Q1 2026: revenue $4.05B (+5.1% CC YoY); FY2026 guidance raised to $22.11-$22.64B revenue with 16.0-16.2% adj. operating margin. Products & Resources segment +8.1% YoY strongest growth vertical.

Equinix targets 9-10% revenue growth and 200bps EBITDA margin improvement in 2026; 430MW leased across 23 xScale facilities; raised dividend 10%. Q4 2025 EPS beat significantly. Q1 2026 earnings expected Apr 29 (already reported).

Digital Realty Q1 2026: Adjusted EBITDA $920M (+16% YoY), net debt/EBITDA 4.7x; raised 2026 Core FFO/share outlook to $8.00-$8.10. Raised $1.3B via ATM equity program. FY2026 revenue guided $6.6-6.7B.

American Tower Q3 2025 revenue +7.7% YoY to $2.72B on AI/hybrid-cloud demand; raised quarterly dividend 4.9% to $1.70/share; 148,000+ communication sites plus US data center network. No material negative credit events.
PayPal executing branded checkout and Venmo monetization strategy; management transition to CEO Alex Chriss progressing. No material negative credit events in the last 60 days.

Corpay Q4 2025: record results; FY2026 guidance targets 16% total revenue growth and 22% adjusted EPS growth; Mastercard partnership driving synergies; payables monetization (eChecks, instant payments) launching Q2/Q3 2026.
Mastercard executing cross-border payments and value-added services growth; Corpay partnership expanding B2B payments reach. No material negative credit events in the last 60 days.

Visa DOJ antitrust suit regarding debit network practices remains pending. Core payment volumes resilient; cross-border travel spend a key growth driver. No material negative credit developments in last 60 days.
